history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a woman
Angel kamera/framing: A medium close-up shot, focusing on the woman's face and upper chest, captured from a slightly low angle, giving a sense of intimacy and drawing the viewer into her gaze. The framing is tight, with the edges of a train or bus window visible on the right side of the image, and a blurred background with a sign on the left. The composition is slightly off-center, with the woman's face dominating the right half of the frame.
Outfit: She is wearing a thick, chunky knit sweater in an off-white or cream color, with a visible textured weave and a soft, slightly fuzzy surface. Draped around her neck and shoulders is a large, oversized scarf with a prominent plaid pattern. The scarf features broad blocks of a warm, earthy brown and a muted, dusty blue, with a soft, slightly fuzzy texture that suggests wool or a similar warm material. The scarf is wrapped loosely, with one end falling over her shoulder and the other tucked around her neck, creating soft folds and a cozy silhouette.
pose: The woman is looking directly at the camera with a gentle, soft smile playing on her lips. Her head is tilted slightly to her left. Her right hand is brought up towards her neck, with her fingers lightly resting on the scarf, just below her chin. Her fingers are slender and delicate, with neatly manicured nails. Her left shoulder is slightly visible, and her body is angled away from the camera. Her eyes are wide and expressive, with a subtle shimmer, conveying a sense of warmth and approachability. There's a subtle hint of shyness in her expression, making the portrait feel candid.
enviroment: The background is softly blurred, suggesting an outdoor setting, possibly a train station or a bus stop during a cold day. On the left, a sign with Japanese characters ("自動車" which means "Automobile" or "Motor Vehicle") is visible, attached to a pole, slightly out of focus. The sign has a white background with black text. Behind the sign, a person in a dark green coat is partially visible, walking away. The overall environment appears to be a bit cold, hinted at by the woman's warm attire. The right side of the image shows the side of a vehicle, likely a train or bus, with a white exterior and a prominent red stripe below a dark blue stripe. The surface of the vehicle has a slight sheen.
lighting: The lighting is soft and natural, likely from an overcast sky or diffused sunlight, creating gentle shadows that highlight the contours of her face without being harsh. The light source appears to be coming from the front and slightly to her left, illuminating her face and giving her skin a soft, luminous quality. There are subtle highlights in her eyes and on her cheekbones. The overall mood is calm and serene, with a touch of melancholy due to the soft, cool tones of the scarf and the blurred background.
Final style: Highly detailed, high resolution. handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect
